description_long: This is a rectangular, broad-shouldered whisky bottle with a slightly rounded base and a short, cylindrical neck topped by a natural cork stopper. The bottle is filled with an amber-brown liquid, typical of whisky, and features a large, cream-colored front label with bold black Japanese kanji, the words 'Suntory Whisky,' and additional smaller text and graphics. The back of the bottle displays a white label densely packed with Japanese text, likely product information and legal details. The bottle's neck is wrapped with a black band featuring white Japanese characters, adding a touch of traditional branding. The overall design is elegant and modern, with a clear glass body that showcases the whisky inside and a prominent, natural cork closure.
description: A rectangular, clear glass whisky bottle filled with amber liquid, featuring a cork stopper and Japanese-labeled branding. The design is elegant with a cream front label and a black neck band.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cream-colored label with bold Japanese kanji, 'Suntory Whisky' text, and a cork stopper.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the bottle's rectangular shape, the edge of the front label, and the black neck band.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white label with dense Japanese text and the cork stopper.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing both the back label and the edge of the front label, as well as the bottle's clear glass body.
attribute_label_or_branding: The front label is large, cream-colored, and rectangular, featuring bold black Japanese kanji, the words 'Suntory Whisky,' and smaller text in both Japanese and English. The label also includes a faint image of a distillery or landscape in the lower right. The back label is white, rectangular, and densely covered with Japanese text, likely product and legal information. The neck has a black band with white Japanese characters. All text is printed in a clean, modern font, and the branding is prominent and traditional.
attribute_bottle_cap_type: Natural cork stopper with a rounded, slightly domed top, appearing to be made of natural cork material. The cork is unadorned and fits snugly into the bottle neck.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: The neck is short, cylindrical, and slightly flared at the base, with a smooth transition from the bottle's shoulders. It is wrapped with a black band featuring white Japanese characters.
